decks.notes: The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to utilize a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counterspells to control the board and outvalue the opponent. By using cards like Abandon Attachments, Combustion Technique, and Boomerang Basics to control the opponent's board, while also drawing cards with Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent, the deck aims to maintain card advantage and control the game. Additionally, cards like Agna Qel'a and Firebending Lesson provide additional control options, while Monument to Endurance and Multiversal Passage offer alternative win conditions.

This deck focuses on quickly developing a strong board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures. By utilizing cards that provide additional mana and allow for easy creature summoning, the deck aims to flood the battlefield with efficient threats. The synergy between cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer enables the player to create powerful combinations and maintain pressure on the opponent. With a streamlined mana base and consistent creature curve, the Mono Green Aggro deck aims to secure victories through fast and relentless aggression.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to control the board and deal damage quickly through a combination of direct damage spells like Burst Lightning and creatures like Elusive Otter. The deck also utilizes bounce effects like Boomerang Basics and Slickshot Show-Off to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By using efficient creatures and burn spells, along with card draw and mana acceleration, this deck aims to pressure the opponent early and maintain momentum throughout the game to secure a swift victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It includes cards that allow for drawing more cards and returning spells to the opponent's hand to provide tempo advantage. The deck also includes some disruption cards like Boomerang Basics and Multiversal Passage to control the opponent's board. With an emphasis on speed and aggression, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish a strong defense. By efficiently using resources and maintaining pressure, the deck aims to secure victory through quick and aggressive plays.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with fast mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves and powerful early game threats like Earthbender Ascension and Badgermole Cub. It also includes ways to protect your creatures and buffs like Mightform Harmonizer to enhance their power. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Escape Tunnel while also maintaining a strong offense with creatures like Sazh's Chocobo. The deck is designed to have a strong early game presence and push for a fast victory before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

This Temur Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and dealing direct damage to the opponent, utilizing high-powered creatures like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider. The deck includes spells like Burst Lightning and Ill-Timed Explosion to control the board and deal additional damage when needed. The mana base is built to ensure consistent access to all three colors of mana. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells while maintaining versatility and flexibility in its gameplay.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to disrupt your opponent's game plan. The key strategy is to keep the opponent's threats at bay while slowly building up your own board presence and card advantage. Utilizing cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt to dig for the cards you need, while cards like Spell Snare and Spell Pierce help you efficiently deal with your opponent's spells. Combining these elements with powerful creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental can help secure your victory.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence with efficient green creatures and using cards like Earthbender Ascension and Esper Origins to gain advantage over opponents. The deck utilizes various ways to ramp up mana, such as Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, to accelerate its game plan. Cards like Ba Sing Se and Meltstrider's Resolve provide additional benefits to the deck's strategy. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and powerful aggro strategy centered around green creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to use various spells and creatures to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bring them back onto the battlefield for a strong reanimator combo. Cards like Bitter Triumph, Requiting Hex, and Doomsday Excruciator help set up the graveyard, while spells like Day of Black Sun and deadly Cover-Up help control the board. Superior Spider-Man and Harvester of Misery provide strong creatures to reanimate, while Stock Up and Insatiable Avarice help draw cards and find key pieces for the combo.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing powerful spells and abilities to outmaneuver and outlast the opponent. With a mix of card draw, removal, and counterspells, the deck aims to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up its own resources and tempo. The key strategy revolves around generating card advantage and efficiency to stay ahead in the game, using cards like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom to cycle through the deck while keeping threats in check with cards like Combustion Technique and Spell Snare.

This deck focuses on quickly casting low-cost spells to deal damage to the opponent, while also utilizing bounce effects to disrupt their strategy. The key strategy is to use cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to deal damage to the opponent's creatures and life total, while also providing card advantage with spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. By efficiently navigating through the deck and controlling the board with bounce effects like Boomerang Basics and Unsummon, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggression and disruption.

The deck focuses on utilizing quick and efficient spells to control the board and deal damage to the opponent. By quickly casting spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and finish them off with creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off. The deck also includes cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt to dig for key pieces and maintain card advantage. The strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with bounce spells like Into the Flood Maw and Bounce Off.

This Simic Aggro deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Nature's Rhythm to summon powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Gene Pollinator. It also utilizes cards like Mockingbird and Quantum Riddler to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck's strategy relies on building a strong board presence early on and overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells, using a combination of low-cost spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board while establishing a strong tempo advantage. The inclusion of Stormchaser's Talent and Sleight of Hand allows for card advantage and consistency, while cards like Eddymurk Crab and Elusive Otter provide evasive threats that can quickly close out the game. Multiversal Passage and Wild Ride provide additional utility and flexibility to deal with various situations.

This Simic Aggro deck focuses on efficient mana ramp with Llanowar Elves and powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk and Craterhoof Behemoth. It utilizes a mix of creatures and spells to apply pressure on the opponent quickly, with cards like Gene Pollinator and Mockingbird providing additional threats. The deck also includes a combination of removal spells like Seam Rip and combat tricks such as Archdruid's Charm to maintain board control. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of powerful creatures and efficient spells, while utilizing its mana ramp to get ahead early in the game.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure on the opponent by playing low-cost, aggressive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off. Utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to deal damage efficiently and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt helps to maintain card advantage and consistency in drawing into the necessary threats and answers. Multiversal Passage and various Verge lands provide mana fixing and flexibility in casting spells. Overall, the deck prioritizes speed and aggression to overwhelm the opponent.
